title: acalypha vulneraria
intro: Acalypha vulneraria, also known as the sensitive plant or sensitive wavy-leafed acalypha, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Acalypha vulneraria include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Acalypha vulneraria can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
